nodes.name: Adversarial
nodes.description: Targeted-attack variants and label inference building blocks from NIPS 2017 adversarial competition winners

nodes.name: auxiliary_logit_loss_fusion
nodes.description: Softmax cross-entropy loss with optional weighted auxiliary logit branch for ensemble adversarial attacks
nodes.type_signature: (main_logits: NDArray[np.float64], labels_onehot: NDArray[np.float64], aux_logits: NDArray[np.float64] | None = None, aux_weight: float = 0.4) -> float

nodes.name: std_normalized_momentum_gradient
nodes.description: Targeted-attack momentum accumulation with double std-normalization to prevent scale drift
nodes.type_signature: (gradient: NDArray[np.float64], previous_accumulated: NDArray[np.float64], momentum: float = 1.0) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: ensemble_prediction_label_inference
nodes.description: Consensus label inference from ensemble predictions with freeze-after-first-iteration for iterative attacks
nodes.type_signature: (predictions: list[NDArray[np.float64]], iteration: int = 0, previous_labels: NDArray[np.int64] | None = None) -> NDArray[np.int64]
